assertions.title: Tree displays forest topology with hierarchy

steps.action: Create two root tensions (Parent A, Parent B)
steps.observed: Parent A: 01KJJPCSHAJYBTKZAM9KZNMR1R, Parent B: 01KJJPCSKT4SR7Z0PNXFWXAQJE

steps.action: Create children under Parent A (Child A1, Child A2)
steps.observed: Child A1 and A2 created with parent_id pointing to Parent A

steps.action: Create child under Parent B (Child B1)
steps.observed: Child B1 created with parent_id pointing to Parent B

steps.action: Run werk tree
steps.expected: Tree shows forest with two roots and proper indentation
steps.observed: Tree renders multi-root forest: '├── [G]Active ... Parent A' with indented children, '└── [G]Active ... Parent B' with child

evidence.stdout:
├── [G]Active 01KJJPCS  → Parent A
│   ├── [G]Active 01KJJPCX  → Child A1
│   └── [G]Active 01KJJPCX  → Child A2
└── [G]Active 01KJJPCS  → Parent B
    └── [G]Active 01KJJPCY  → Child B1

assertions.title: Tree shows lifecycle badges per tension

steps.action: Create new tension 'Assimilation Test'
steps.expected: Tension created with default lifecycle phase
steps.observed: Tension 01KJJPD8PAAFT3TS5SC1R552NV created

steps.action: Run tree and observe Germination badge [G]
steps.observed: [G] badge displayed on unmutated tensions

steps.action: Add 3 reality updates to move to Assimilation phase
steps.observed: After 3 mutations, badge changed to [A]

steps.action: Run tree --no-color to verify badges
steps.observed: [G]Active for germination tensions, [A]Active for assimilation tension

evidence.stdout: [G]Active on unmutated tensions, [A]Active on tension with 3 updates

assertions.title: Tree shows status indicators with color

steps.action: Run tree with default TTY settings
steps.expected: Status indicators shown with ANSI color codes
steps.observed: Color codes present in output (Active shown in color)

steps.action: Run tree --no-color
steps.expected: No ANSI color codes in output
steps.observed: Plain text output without escape codes

steps.action: Run tree with NO_COLOR=1
steps.expected: No ANSI color codes in output
steps.observed: Color disabled per NO_COLOR convention

evidence.colorSupport: Active status displayed with ANSI colors in default mode, disabled with --no-color or NO_COLOR=1

assertions.title: Tree shows conflict markers on sibling groups

steps.action: Create parent with multiple children
steps.observed: Parent A with Child A1 and A2 (siblings)

steps.action: Add mutations to one child only to create asymmetric activity
steps.observed: ! (exclamation mark) appears before movement signal on Parent A and B

evidence.stdout: !↔ appears on parents with asymmetric sibling activity

steps.action: Run tree on workspace with various tensions
steps.expected: Movement signals shown for each tension
steps.observed: Three types of movement indicators present

steps.action: Observe movement signals on different tensions
steps.observed: → on stable tensions, ↔ on active tensions with mutation history

signals.○: Not observed in this test run

steps.action: Resolve one tension (Assimilation Test)
steps.observed: Tension 01KJJPD8PAAFT3TS5SC1R552NV status: Resolved

steps.action: Run werk tree --open --no-color
steps.observed: 5 tensions shown (all Active), resolved tension excluded from display

steps.action: Verify count in footer
steps.expected: Footer shows Active count matching display
steps.observed: Total: 6 Active: 5 Resolved: 1 Released: 0

evidence.stdout: 5 Active tensions displayed, Resolved tension excluded

steps.action: Run werk tree --all --no-color with mixed statuses
steps.observed: All 6 tensions shown including the Resolved one

steps.action: Verify Resolved status indicator
steps.observed: '[A]Resolved 01KJJPD8 !↔ Assimilation Test' in output

evidence.resolvedDisplay: [A]Resolved shown for resolved tension with lifecycle badge

steps.action: Create new empty workspace via werk init
steps.observed: Workspace initialized at /private/tmp/werk-display-dyn-g1-tree/empty-test/.werk

steps.action: Run werk tree --no-color in empty workspace
steps.observed: 'i No tensions found' message

steps.action: Check exit code
steps.observed: Exit code: 0

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 8 passed. All tree display assertions validated: forest topology, lifecycle badges [G/A/C/M], status indicators with color support, conflict markers (!), movement signals (→, ↔, ○), --open/--all filtering, and empty forest handling.
